{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231353280F2B85A11686384A36E9"}"},"total":5946},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6804700732236333064","common":{"comment_type":2,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比起其他的小说，这本小说感动了我，看完后我全身充满了看劲，给人一种轻飘飘的舒适。内容情节引人入胜，虽写异能，却也很写实。步步进逼，也环环相扣，或虚或实中又尽显人间百态。鉴宝的部分提现了古玩的内核，人物刻画如果再深刻鲜明点，次要人物再少点笔墨，就更紧凑了！作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1583758957,"group_id":"6674425487353187332","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生如梦，总有梦醒之时","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyetqfCRQbde7EZdMe6i4zw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a11e31a1ad4f47c29b01c158da322a93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789451&x-signature=57TfpMlpys9bmHJKGgwsD6Y87Gg%3D","user_id":"852837139483320","user_name":"史密斯夫妇233"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"852837139483320","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6674425487353187332","book_info":{"abstract":"父亲得了重病，巨额医药费让古玩店学徒杨波压力巨大，却因为善心偶得琉璃石，让他拥有了一双鉴宝金瞳！
